rule-node-config.exchange-name-pattern rule-node-config.routing-key-pattern rule-node-config.message-properties @for (property of messageProperties; track property) { {{ property }} }
rule-node-config.host @if (rabbitMqConfigForm.get('host').hasError('required')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.host-required' | translate }} } rule-node-config.port @if (rabbitMqConfigForm.get('port').hasError('required')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.port-required' | translate }} } @if (rabbitMqConfigForm.get('port').hasError('min')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.port-range' | translate }} } @if (rabbitMqConfigForm.get('port').hasError('max')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.port-range' | translate }} }
rule-node-config.virtual-host rule-node-config.username rule-node-config.password {{ 'rule-node-config.automatic-recovery' | translate }} rule-node-config.connection-timeout-ms @if (rabbitMqConfigForm.get('connectionTimeout').hasError('min')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.min-connection-timeout-ms-message' | translate }} } rule-node-config.handshake-timeout-ms @if (rabbitMqConfigForm.get('handshakeTimeout').hasError('min')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.min-handshake-timeout-ms-message' | translate }} }
